Document:
# Sector Chaos This guide will explain Sector Chaos, one of the consequences of participation in the Precursor system.
## Chaos Rising Every time precusor is earned the Sector Chaos will rise by an equal amount. As Sector Chaos rises some dangerous effects and events will curse the Sector. The nature of these effects is very unpredictable. After a major Chaos Consequence, the Sector Chaos will reset.
